name: New High Priority Target Detected
notes: This rule triggers when a new high priority target is detected.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
when the event matches Priority (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Priority (custom) is greater than 29.98
when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of High Priority Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY New High Priority Target Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
AND when the event matches Priority (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Priority (custom) is greater than 29.98
AND NOT when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of High Priority Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: New High Priority Target Detected
Event description: Detects a new high priority target.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Threat Name (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add the "Target ID" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "High Priority Target"
